{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Engineer - Technician",
  "description": "Hilton is the leading global hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full-service hotels and resorts to extended-stay suites and mid-priced hotels. For nearly a century, Hilton has offered business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Hilton is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences across its global brands. Our vision to fill the earth with the light and warmth of hospitality unites us as a team to create remarkable hospitality experiences around the world every day. And our amazing Team Members are at the heart of it all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Engineer - Technician

Job ID: HOT0C9F8
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Description

An Engin


	&nbsp;
	ineer/Technician will support the Engineering Team to efficiently maintain all hotel operations such that safety, security, conversation, and compliance are ensured at the highest levels.


What will I be doing?


	As Engineer/Technician, you will support the Engineering Team to ensure that engineering and maintenance operations within the hotel, including general property maintenance energy conservation, are working properly and to standard.
	You are also responsible for the development of the Engineering Team and staying abreast of compliance regulations and procedures in the field of Engineering, as required for hotel standards.


Specifically, an Engineer will perform the following tasks to the highest standards:


	Perform day-to-day routine and preventative maintenance within the hotel rooms
	Respond promptly and efficiently to any maintenance calls that arise
	Execute the preventative maintenance schedule and ensure all equipment and designated areas are maintained to the required standard
	Assist in the implementation of energy conservation program
	Recommend maintenance system improvements and energy savings
	Maintain all tools, equipment, and working areas in good condition
	Keep your technical training knowledge and skills up to date


What are we looking for?
An Engineer/Technician serving Hilton brands is always working on behalf of our Guests and working with other Team Members. To successfully fill this role, you should maintain the attitude, behaviours, skills, and values that follow:


	A certificate in a specialized field such as Electrical, Mechanical, Refrigeration, Carpentry, or Plumbing, required
	Current working knowledge of general maintenance and engineering work
	Experience in the Maintenance Department of a large hotel, hospital, ship, and/or restaurant complex or similar
	Strong work ethic
	A passion for delivering great customer service
	Ability to work without close supervision and within established timeframes.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-17",
  "validThrough": "2026-04-18",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Hilton Worldwide"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "196049"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Engineer - Technician Job at Hilton Worldwidde




        
    

        
        Hilton is the leading global hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full-service hotels and resorts to extended-stay suites and mid-priced hotels. For nearly a century, Hilton has offered business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Hilton is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences across its global brands. Our vision to fill the earth with the light and warmth of hospitality unites us as a team to create remarkable hospitality experiences around the world every day. And our amazing Team Members are at the heart of it all.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Engineer - Technician
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job ID: HOT0C9F8
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Description

An Engin


	 
	ineer/Technician will support the Engineering Team to efficiently maintain all hotel operations such that safety, security, conversation, and compliance are ensured at the highest levels.


What will I be doing?


	As Engineer/Technician, you will support the Engineering Team to ensure that engineering and maintenance operations within the hotel, including general property maintenance energy conservation, are working properly and to standard.
	You are also responsible for the development of the Engineering Team and staying abreast of compliance regulations and procedures in the field of Engineering, as required for hotel standards.


Specifically, an Engineer will perform the following tasks to the highest standards:


	Perform day-to-day routine and preventative maintenance within the hotel rooms
	Respond promptly and efficiently to any maintenance calls that arise
	Execute the preventative maintenance schedule and ensure all equipment and designated areas are maintained to the required standard
	Assist in the implementation of energy conservation program
	Recommend maintenance system improvements and energy savings
	Maintain all tools, equipment, and working areas in good condition
	Keep your technical training knowledge and skills up to date


What are we looking for?
An Engineer/Technician serving Hilton brands is always working on behalf of our Guests and working with other Team Members. To successfully fill this role, you should maintain the attitude, behaviours, skills, and values that follow:


	A certificate in a specialized field such as Electrical, Mechanical, Refrigeration, Carpentry, or Plumbing, required
	Current working knowledge of general maintenance and engineering work
	Experience in the Maintenance Department of a large hotel, hospital, ship, and/or restaurant complex or similar
	Strong work ethic
	A passion for delivering great customer service
	Ability to work without close supervision and within established timeframes.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Engineer",
  "description": "Suminter is the producer of 100% certified-organic, all natural, non-GMO organic products. We work with over 1,00,000 farmers to deliver the highest quality food, fibers and other organic products.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer

Job Location: Mowe - Ibafo, Expressway, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	
	The Electrical Engineer is responsible for designing, maintaining, and improving electrical systems and equipment to ensure efficient and safe operations within the organization.
	
	The role involves troubleshooting electrical faults, supporting maintenance activities, and ensuring compliance with safety and regulatory standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, install, and maintain electrical systems and equipment.
	Troubleshoot electrical faults and ensure timely repairs.
	Conduct routine inspections and preventive maintenance on electrical equipment.
	Ensure compliance with electrical safety standards and regulations.
	Monitor electrical systems performance and recommend improvements.
	Support installation and commissioning of new electrical equipment.
	Maintain accurate documentation of electrical systems and maintenance activities.
	Collaborate with other technicians/engineering teams to ensure smooth plant operations.


Salary
N400,000 per month.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",

Electrical Engineer Job at Suminter




        
    

        
        Suminter is the producer of 100% certified-organic, all natural, non-GMO organic products. We work with over 1,00,000 farmers to deliver the highest quality food, fibers and other organic products.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer

Job Location: Mowe - Ibafo, Expressway, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	
	The Electrical Engineer is responsible for designing, maintaining, and improving electrical systems and equipment to ensure efficient and safe operations within the organization.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    


	
	The role involves troubleshooting electrical faults, supporting maintenance activities, and ensuring compliance with safety and regulatory standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, install, and maintain electrical systems and equipment.
	Troubleshoot electrical faults and ensure timely repairs.
	Conduct routine inspections and preventive maintenance on electrical equipment.
	Ensure compliance with electrical safety standards and regulations.
	Monitor electrical systems performance and recommend improvements.
	Support installation and commissioning of new electrical equipment.
	Maintain accurate documentation of electrical systems and maintenance activities.
	Collaborate with other technicians/engineering teams to ensure smooth plant operations.


Salary
N400,000 per month.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketer",

	Minimum of 2-3 years of work experience in accounting, bookkeeping, or finance-related role.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	High level of integrity, attention to detail, and accuracy.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to:&nbsp;kingsguards@kingsguards.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.&nbsp;",

Account Officer Job at Kings Guards Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Kings Guards Nigeria Limited is recruiting to fill the position below: 

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Lagos

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Minimum of 2-3 years of work experience in accounting, bookkeeping, or finance-related role.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	High level of integrity, attention to detail, and accuracy.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
